title: Nami Fights to Keep the Treasure
description: On pages 5–8, Nami’s obsession with treasure collides with Luffy’s blunt honesty and Buggy’s chaos.
scene: Nami tries to protect what she has stolen or earned, while the surrounding fight keeps pulling her deeper into the Straw Hats’ orbit.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: What nonsense!! That treasure's mine!! Do you think that if you steal it it

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: How the hell were you brought up?!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: A lecture from a bad guy?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I don't think I've done anything bad enough

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: to be lectured by a pirate!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: you're prepared for this, aren't you, Nami...!!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Kuhaha- Hahahaha- Hahahaha!!! see if you can protect your friend now!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Damn it! There should be a limit to this bara Bara!!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: If it's like this, there's no way I can fight him!!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: What's this? The feet can't fly?

summary: The part keeps Nami morally complicated: she is selfish, clever, and frightened, but also increasingly tied to Luffy and Zoro.
